scripts.test: npm run build && node --test lib/gameCoordinator.test.js lib/turnCoordinator.test.js lib/humanGameAction.test.js lib/matchFinalizer.test.js
scripts.test:emulator: npm run build && firebase emulators:exec --project demo-domino --only firestore "node --test --test-concurrency=1 lib/terminalGameCoordinator.integration.test.js lib/activeTurnCoordinator.integration.test.js lib/submitGameAction.integration.test.js lib/matchFinalizer.integration.test.js lib/roomLifecycle.integration.test.js"
scripts.serve: npm run build && firebase emulators:start --only functions
